title: Aureline docs / help pane source-version-freshness, mirror/offline, and external-open contract
description: Boundary schema for the help_pane_state_record frozen in docs/docs/docs_help_pane_contract.md. Every embedded docs pane, docs browser body, Help / About pane, service-health pane, support-summary pane, onboarding help overlay, and AI-explanation pane reads one shared help_pane_state_record before rendering source / version / freshness / cache / offline / mirror / locale / external-open posture. The record never re-mints docs-pack manifest, destination-descriptor, or help-status-badge vocabulary; it cites those records by opaque id and projects per-pane state (cache class, install state, locale availability, external-open path, policy-limited behavior, stale-example disclosure, copy-rule class) on top of them. Raw docs bytes, raw runbook bodies, raw symbol definitions, raw URLs, and raw issue-template bodies never cross this boundary; the record carries opaque ids and typed vocabulary only. The eventual docs-help-service-health crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new pane_role, source_class, cache_class, install_state, offline_posture, mirror_chain_status, locale_availability_state, locale_fallback_disclosure_class, external_open_path, policy_limited_behavior, copy_rule_class, stale_example_disclosure_class, denial_reason, or canonical_owner_class is additive-minor and bumps help_pane_state_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

help_pane_state_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this help-pane-state export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests, support exports, release-evidence packets, and claim manifests. Raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw page bodies, raw runbook bodies, and raw symbol definitions never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

bcp47_locale_tag.description: BCP-47 language tag (for example en, en-US, pt-BR, zh-Hant-HK). Case is normalized by the producer but preserved here for round-trip compatibility.

pane_role.description: Closed pane-role vocabulary naming which embedded docs / help surface this state record projects. The in-product docs pane, the embedded docs-browser body, the Help / About pane, the service-health pane, the support-summary pane, an onboarding help overlay, an AI-explanation pane, and a release-notice pane all consume this record family without inventing parallel pane vocabulary.

source_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/help_status_badge.schema.json without modification (ADR-0013). The pane MUST quote the same source class the underlying help_status_badge_record carries.

version_match_state.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/help_status_badge.schema.json without modification (ADR-0013). Computed at render time against the running build's exact-build identity.

exact_build_applicability.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/destination_descriptor.schema.json without modification. not_build_bound is reserved for panes whose payload is independent of the running build (release notices, generic glossary).

freshness_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/help_status_badge.schema.json (which re-exports from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json) without modification (ADR-0011 / ADR-0013). A pane whose canonical owner has not been contacted within its refresh window MUST NOT render authoritative_live.

cache_class.description: Closed cache-class vocabulary. Distinct from freshness_class so a pane can describe the cache state separately from how current the source truth is. live_authoritative_no_cache is the no-cache live render. warm_cached_within_window is a recent live fetch still inside the pack's refresh window. cold_cached_outside_window is a copy past its refresh window but the live owner is still reachable. cached_snapshot_only_owner_unreachable is the offline / cannot-reach-owner case where only the cached snapshot serves. mirror_only_verified_offline is a signed-mirror copy and the live owner is not in scope. mirror_continuity_broken means the mirror chain failed verification. expired_cached_requires_refresh means an offline expiration deadline passed and the pane MUST suppress the body until refresh. not_cached_not_installed means the pack was referenced but no copy is resident. cache_disabled_by_policy means admin policy or workspace-trust forbids caching for this pane.

install_state.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/onboarding_pack_state.schema.json (which composes the docs_pack_manifest publishable state with onboarding install vocabulary) without modification. Names whether the underlying pack copy is current, cached, mirror-only, not_installed, remote_unavailable, policy_blocked, quarantined, or withdrawn from the pane's perspective.

offline_posture.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/onboarding_pack_state.schema.json (which re-layers schemas/docs/destination_descriptor.schema.json#offline_behavior) without modification. The pane projects the same offline posture the underlying pack and destination descriptor declare.

mirror_chain_status.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/docs_pack_manifest.schema.json without modification. not_applicable is used for source classes that do not mirror upstream (project_docs, generated_reference, support_runbook, derived_explanation, external_status_feed). predecessor_missing and signing_chain_broken MUST suppress the pane with the typed mirror_continuity_broken denial reason.

locale_availability_state.description: Closed locale-availability vocabulary at the pane level. Composes the docs-pack locale_coverage_class with the onboarding-pack locale_presence_class without re-minting either: requested_locale_authoritative, requested_locale_partial, requested_locale_machine_assisted, requested_locale_stub, and requested_locale_stale_copy mirror the docs-pack coverage classes. requested_locale_missing_fallback_to_primary, requested_locale_not_installed, and requested_locale_policy_blocked mirror the missing-locale presence classes from onboarding_pack_state and MUST render a typed disclosure on the primary surface (tooltip-only disclosure is forbidden). locale_not_applicable_to_pane is reserved for panes whose payload is locale-neutral (release-notice opaque codes, certain service-health rows).

locale_fallback_disclosure_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/onboarding_pack_state.schema.json without modification. The pane MUST never imply a silent fallback when the requested locale is missing or partial; it picks one of the typed disclosure classes.

external_open_path.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/destination_descriptor.schema.json#external_open_policy without modification. Names the policy that governs the open-in-browser action the pane may expose for the same logical object.

browser_handoff_reason_subset.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/destination_descriptor.schema.json (which re-exports from schemas/docs/help_status_badge.schema.json) without modification. The pane MUST quote one of these screenshot-safe / export-safe reasons; minting a parallel reason vocabulary is forbidden.

data_exit_boundary.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/destination_descriptor.schema.json without modification. The pane discloses what leaves the product before navigation or export.

disclosure_safety_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/destination_descriptor.schema.json without modification. Browser and device-code handoff reasons exposed by this pane MUST remain screenshot-safe and export-safe.

disclosure_mode.description: Re-exported from schemas/docs/destination_descriptor.schema.json without modification. Local and cached panes disclose inline; embedded panes disclose with the host-owned boundary card (ADR-0015); browser / device-code handoff panes disclose before leaving the product.

support_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (and schemas/docs/destination_descriptor.schema.json) without modification. Support class stays a separate axis from trust class, freshness, and client scope.

canonical_owner_class.description: Closed canonical-owner vocabulary naming which canonical owner the pane projects state from. Re-exports the ADR-0013 owner roles named for docs-pack source classes, plus the service-health aggregator (service-health panes), the about-packet publisher (Help / About panes), the release-notice descriptor publisher (release-notice panes), and the external status feed publisher (external_status_feed source class). The pane MUST cite a canonical owner explicitly so a parity audit can compare panes against the owner's truth without inventing routing.

policy_limited_behavior.description: Closed policy-limited-behavior vocabulary. Captures the way ADR-0008 admin policy or ADR-0001 workspace-trust narrows the pane without inventing parallel copy. Multiple narrowings can apply at once; surfaces emit one record per pane and MUST quote the dominant narrowing here, listing additional narrowings on denial_reasons. pane_suppressed_by_policy denies render entirely with the policy_blocked denial reason.

copy_rule_class.description: Closed copy-rule vocabulary. Each pane state resolves to exactly one copy_rule_class so panes cannot collapse cached, mirrored, stale, not-installed, locale-unavailable, version-mismatched, policy-limited, and external-open states into vague 'available' or 'learn more' copy. The class names which disclosure copy the pane MUST render on the primary surface; tooltip-only disclosure is forbidden for any class other than live_authoritative_truth_copy.

stale_example_disclosure_class.description: Closed stale-example disclosure vocabulary at the pane level. no_stale_examples is the publishable default. stale_examples_disclosed_inline applies when the pane renders one or more stale_example / needs_review_example entries from the docs-pack manifest with the typed disclosure on the primary surface. stale_examples_quarantined_hidden applies when the pane hides quarantined examples (still enumerated in the manifest but never rendered to the user). stale_examples_exceed_threshold_pane_suppressed applies when the docs-pack manifest's stale_examples_exceed_threshold is true; the pane MUST suppress the body and surface the typed denial.

denial_reason.description: Closed pane-level denial-reason vocabulary. Composes the docs_pack_manifest publishable_blocking_reason set, the help_status_badge denial_reason set, and the onboarding_pack_state publishable_denial_reason set without inventing pane-local reasons. A pane whose renderable boolean is false MUST name at least one reason; silent suppression with a generic 'unavailable' chip is forbidden.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011 / ADR-0007). Declared per-record; the broker-owned redaction pass runs before bytes reach any persistent or exportable sink.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the record was minted.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the record was minted inside a live execution. Null when minted outside an execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. ADR-0008 / ADR-0009 policy epoch and ADR-0001 trust state are re-validated on every render.

hook_kind.description: Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json with the onboarding-scoped extensions from schemas/docs/onboarding_pack_state.schema.json without modification.

display_label.description: Short human-legible label the surface may render next to the typed denial copy.

repair_hook_ref.description: Typed repair hook required when renderable is false. A pane whose renderable is false but whose repair_hook_ref is null is non-conforming.

docs_pack_manifest_ref.description: Opaque pin to the docs-pack manifest that backs this pane. Null only when source_class is one of derived_explanation, vendor_provider_docs, or external_status_feed (which do not ship as docs-pack manifests). Required (non-null) for project_docs, generated_reference, mirrored_official_docs, curated_knowledge_pack, and support_runbook source classes.

destination_descriptor_ref.description: Opaque pin to the destination_descriptor_record (schemas/docs/destination_descriptor.schema.json) that owns the route / trust / boundary / external-open posture for this pane. The pane quotes that descriptor instead of minting a parallel route vocabulary.

help_status_badge_ref.description: Opaque pin to the help_status_badge_record (schemas/docs/help_status_badge.schema.json) the pane renders inline. Null when the pane has not yet emitted a parity-audit badge (rare; service-health panes always carry one).

onboarding_pack_state_ref.description: Optional opaque pin to an onboarding_pack_state_record when the pane is consumed inside an onboarding help overlay or guided-tour step. Null for in-product docs panes, embedded docs-browser bodies, Help / About panes, service-health panes, support-summary panes, and AI-explanation panes.

canonical_owner_id.description: Opaque pin to the canonical owner instance (registry / aggregator / publisher) that resolved this pane's truth. Null only for source_class = derived_explanation when the pane is a session-scoped overlay that has not yet routed to a canonical owner.

display_source_version.description: Human-legible version or channel string the pane renders alongside the source / freshness / cache chips. Null only when source_class is external_status_feed and no version is published.

version_match_state.description: Version-match state against the running build. Null only when exact_build_applicability = not_build_bound.

running_build_identity_ref.description: Opaque pin to the running build's exact-build identity (D-0011) when the pane is build-bound. Null when exact_build_applicability = not_build_bound.

last_refreshed_at.description: Monotonic timestamp of the last refresh against the canonical owner. Null when the pane is packaged locally with the binary and has no live refresh path.

offline_expiration_at.description: Monotonic deadline after which an offline / air-gapped acquisition MUST be treated as stale regardless of freshness_class. Null for live-fetch / locally-built / host-process-internal acquisitions.

requested_locale.description: Locale the user / surface requested at render time. When the pack cannot satisfy this locale, effective_locale falls back and locale_fallback_disclosure_class MUST NOT be no_fallback_primary_locale_only.

effective_locale.description: Locale the pane actually renders. Equal to requested_locale when the locale is available; otherwise equal to the fallback the surface resolved.

external_destination_descriptor_ref.description: Opaque pin to the destination descriptor that the pane hands off to when external_open_path is anything other than not_permitted. Null when external_open_path = not_permitted and no fallback leaves the product.

browser_handoff_reason.description: Required (non-null) when external_open_path is one of optional_same_object, required_primary_route, or required_fallback_when_in_product_unavailable. Null when external_open_path = not_permitted. The reason MUST come from the screenshot-safe / export-safe subset re-exported from the destination descriptor.

disclosure_safety_class.description: Required (non-null) when browser_handoff_reason is non-null. Null when external_open_path = not_permitted.

client_scopes.description: Client classes this pane is published for. A client whose scope is excluded MUST NOT render the pane as available there; the pane denies render with the client_scope_excludes_surface reason instead.

stale_example_refs.description: Opaque pins to the docs-pack stale_example_ref / needs_review_example entries the pane is rendering with the typed disclosure. Empty when stale_example_disclosure_class is no_stale_examples or stale_examples_quarantined_hidden.

known_limits_summary_ref.description: Optional opaque pin to a known-limits descriptor list the pane projects onto Help / About / support-summary chrome. Null when no known-limits row is in scope for this pane.

support_export_packet_ref.description: Optional opaque pin to a support-export packet the pane composes into when the user invokes a support-summary export. Null for panes outside the support-export lane.

renderable.description: True when the pane body may render to the user under the current source / version / freshness / cache / install / locale / policy posture. False when at least one denial_reason applies. A pane whose docs-pack manifest is non-publishable, whose offline expiration has passed, whose locale is missing-and-not-installed, whose policy blocks the pane, or whose mirror chain broke MUST carry renderable = false.

denial_reasons.description: Frozen list of typed denial reasons. MUST be empty when renderable = true; MUST be non-empty when renderable = false. Silent suppression of a pane without a typed reason is forbidden.

repair_hook_ref.description: Required (non-null) when renderable = false. Null when renderable = true.

__fixture__.description: Opaque metadata envelope used by worked fixtures to carry scenario / exercised-axes / contract-sections blocks. Never read by product code.

allOf.description: Build-bound panes MUST carry a running_build_identity_ref and a version_match_state.
not_build_bound panes MUST keep build / version fields null.
renderable = true MUST carry an empty denial_reasons list and a null repair_hook_ref.
renderable = false MUST carry at least one denial reason and a non-null repair_hook_ref.
cache_class = expired_cached_requires_refresh MUST suppress the pane with the cached_snapshot_expired (or air_gapped_bundle_expired) denial reason.
cache_class = mirror_continuity_broken MUST suppress the pane with the mirror_continuity_broken denial reason.
cache_class = not_cached_not_installed MUST suppress the pane with the pack_not_installed denial reason.
install_state = remote_unavailable MUST suppress the pane with the remote_owner_unreachable denial reason unless cache_class names a usable cached / mirror snapshot.
install_state = quarantined MUST suppress the pane with the pack_quarantined reason.
install_state = withdrawn MUST suppress the pane with the pack_withdrawn reason.
version_match_state = incompatible_drift_detected MUST suppress the pane with the incompatible_drift_detected reason.
locale_availability_state = requested_locale_not_installed MUST suppress the pane with the locale_missing_not_installed reason.
locale_availability_state = requested_locale_policy_blocked MUST suppress the pane with the locale_policy_blocked reason.
stale_example_disclosure_class = stale_examples_exceed_threshold_pane_suppressed MUST suppress the pane with the stale_examples_exceed_threshold reason.
policy_limited_behavior = pane_suppressed_by_policy MUST suppress the pane with the policy_blocked reason.
policy_limited_behavior = external_open_blocked_by_policy MUST set external_open_path = not_permitted.
Source classes that ship as docs-pack manifests MUST carry a non-null docs_pack_manifest_ref.
Source classes that do not ship as docs-pack manifests MUST keep docs_pack_manifest_ref null.
external_open_path = not_permitted MUST keep browser_handoff_reason and disclosure_safety_class null and external_destination_descriptor_ref null.
external_open_path other than not_permitted MUST carry a screenshot-safe / export-safe browser_handoff_reason and a non-null external_destination_descriptor_ref.
Embedded docs-browser bodies MUST disclose with the embedded boundary card.
Cached / mirror / not-installed / locale-missing copy classes MUST NOT claim live authoritative truth copy.
live_authoritative_truth_copy MUST pair with live_authoritative_no_cache and freshness_class = authoritative_live.

help_pane_state_record.description: Help-pane-state record consumed by every embedded docs pane, docs-browser body, Help / About pane, service-health pane, support-summary pane, onboarding help overlay, and AI-explanation pane before the pane body is rendered. Composes the docs-pack manifest source / version / signing / mirror-lineage / locale fields, the destination-descriptor route / boundary / external-open fields, and pane-specific cache / install / locale-availability / external-open / policy / stale-example / copy-rule fields in one typed record so the pane cannot imply live, current, or authoritative truth when content is cached, mirrored, stale, missing, locale-blocked, or policy-narrowed.
